auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Gender-API.com v2 API token sent as a Bearer token. Create or manage tokens in your Gender-API.com account: https://gender-api.com/en/account/auth-tokens

actions.name: get_country_of_origin
actions.description: Get likely country-of-origin and ethnicity metadata for one first name, full name, or email address.

first_name.description: The first name to analyze with Gender-API.com.

full_name.description: The full name to analyze with Gender-API.com.

email.description: The email address to analyze with Gender-API.com.

anyOf.description: A caller-supplied string ID echoed by Gender-API.com.
A caller-supplied integer ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

id.description: An optional caller-supplied ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

input.description: The submitted payload echoed by Gender-API.com.

credits_used.description: The number of credits consumed by this query.

samples.description: The number of records that matched the query.

anyOf.description: The country Gender-API.com found or applied to the query.

first_name_sanitized.description: The first name after Gender-API.com normalization.

full_name_sanitized.description: The full name after Gender-API.com normalization.

email_sanitized.description: The email address after Gender-API.com normalization.

result_found.description: Whether Gender-API.com found origin metadata for the input.

probability.description: The probability that the queried name originates from this country.

continental_region.description: The continental region containing the country.

statistical_region.description: The statistical region containing the country.

items.description: One likely country of origin returned by Gender-API.com.

country_of_origin.description: The likely countries of origin returned by Gender-API.com.

country_of_origin_map_url.description: A Gender-API.com map URL for the returned country-of-origin distribution.

first_name.description: The first name Gender-API.com used for the analysis.

probability.description: The probability score for the inferred gender.

gender.description: The inferred gender value returned by Gender-API.com.

language_of_origin.description: The likely language of origin when returned.

meaning.description: The documented name meaning when returned.

percentage.description: The percentage for this ethnicity distribution entry.

items.description: One ethnicity distribution entry returned by Gender-API.com.

distribution.description: The ethnicity distribution entries returned by Gender-API.com.

outputSchema.description: A country-of-origin response returned by Gender-API.com.

actions.name: get_statistics
actions.description: Read remaining credits and recent usage statistics for the connected account.

inputSchema.description: Input for querying Gender-API.com account statistics.

is_limit_reached.description: Whether the account has reached its current usage limit.

remaining_credits.description: The credits remaining on the account.

credits_used.description: The number of credits consumed by this statistics query.

details.description: Technical details returned by the Gender-API.com statistics endpoint.

date.description: The month represented by this usage entry.

credits_used.description: The credits consumed during the previous month.

usage_last_month.description: Gender-API.com usage information for the previous month.

outputSchema.description: Account usage statistics returned by Gender-API.com.

actions.name: query_gender_by_email_address
actions.description: Determine the likely gender for one email address after Gender-API.com extracts a name from it.

email.description: The email address to classify with Gender-API.com.

country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the query.

locale.description: The optional browser locale used by Gender-API.com to localize the query.

ip.description: The optional IPv4 or IPv6 address used by Gender-API.com to localize the query.

anyOf.description: A caller-supplied string ID echoed by Gender-API.com.
A caller-supplied integer ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

id.description: An optional caller-supplied ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

inputSchema.description: Input for querying gender by email address.

input.description: The submitted payload echoed by Gender-API.com.

credits_used.description: The number of credits consumed by this query.

samples.description: The number of records that matched the query.

anyOf.description: The country Gender-API.com found or applied to the query.

first_name_sanitized.description: The first name after Gender-API.com normalization.

full_name_sanitized.description: The full name after Gender-API.com normalization.

email_sanitized.description: The email address after Gender-API.com normalization.

result_found.description: Whether Gender-API.com found a gender result for the input.

first_name.description: The first name Gender-API.com used for genderization.

last_name.description: The last name extracted by Gender-API.com when available.

full_name.description: The full name Gender-API.com used for genderization when available.

email.description: The email address Gender-API.com used for genderization when available.

probability.description: The probability score for the inferred gender.

gender.description: The inferred gender value returned by Gender-API.com.

outputSchema.description: A gender lookup response returned by Gender-API.com.

country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the query.

locale.description: The optional browser locale used by Gender-API.com to localize the query.

ip.description: The optional IPv4 or IPv6 address used by Gender-API.com to localize the query.

anyOf.description: A caller-supplied string ID echoed by Gender-API.com.
A caller-supplied integer ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

id.description: An optional caller-supplied ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

inputSchema.description: Input for querying gender by first name.

input.description: The submitted payload echoed by Gender-API.com.

credits_used.description: The number of credits consumed by this query.

samples.description: The number of records that matched the query.

anyOf.description: The country Gender-API.com found or applied to the query.

first_name_sanitized.description: The first name after Gender-API.com normalization.

full_name_sanitized.description: The full name after Gender-API.com normalization.

email_sanitized.description: The email address after Gender-API.com normalization.

result_found.description: Whether Gender-API.com found a gender result for the input.

first_name.description: The first name Gender-API.com used for genderization.

last_name.description: The last name extracted by Gender-API.com when available.

full_name.description: The full name Gender-API.com used for genderization when available.

email.description: The email address Gender-API.com used for genderization when available.

probability.description: The probability score for the inferred gender.

gender.description: The inferred gender value returned by Gender-API.com.

outputSchema.description: A gender lookup response returned by Gender-API.com.

actions.name: query_gender_by_full_name
actions.description: Determine the likely gender for one full name while letting Gender-API.com split the name.

full_name.description: The full name to classify with Gender-API.com.

country.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the query.

locale.description: The optional browser locale used by Gender-API.com to localize the query.

ip.description: The optional IPv4 or IPv6 address used by Gender-API.com to localize the query.

anyOf.description: A caller-supplied string ID echoed by Gender-API.com.
A caller-supplied integer ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

id.description: An optional caller-supplied ID echoed by Gender-API.com.

credits_used.description: The number of credits consumed by this query.

samples.description: The number of records that matched the query.

anyOf.description: The country Gender-API.com found or applied to the query.

first_name_sanitized.description: The first name after Gender-API.com normalization.

full_name_sanitized.description: The full name after Gender-API.com normalization.

email_sanitized.description: The email address after Gender-API.com normalization.

result_found.description: Whether Gender-API.com found a gender result for the input.

first_name.description: The first name Gender-API.com used for genderization.

last_name.description: The last name extracted by Gender-API.com when available.

full_name.description: The full name Gender-API.com used for genderization when available.

email.description: The email address Gender-API.com used for genderization when available.
